title: Staking
subtitle: Earn rewards by delegating XRP to the community pool.

hero.title: Put your XRP to work
hero.body: Stake XRP to earn rewards at {{apr}}% APR. Funds remain on the XRPL — payouts arrive automatically on a monthly schedule.

pool.title: Pool details
pool.body: Custodial XRP pool. Rewards are accrued daily and paid out every 30 days.

empty.title: No staking positions yet
empty.body: Stake some XRP to start earning rewards. You can withdraw at any time.

modal.title: Stake XRP
modal.intro: Delegate XRP to the community pool and earn {{apr}}% APR. Rewards accrue daily and are paid monthly.
modal.disclaimer: Staking rewards are estimates. Actual returns depend on pool performance and may vary.
